_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Quality assurance of data and analysis involves sorting and cleansing information so that any conclusions based on it can be made with confidence.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness, validity, integrity) and the measurement approaches applicable to each dimension.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.553), DQ-T-005 (DQ, cosine: 0.548).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.507). Shared vocabulary: [data, quality]. DDaT-only terms [analysis, assurance, based, cleansing, conclusions, confidence] vs WIDAI-only terms [accuracy, applicable, approaches, completeness, consistency, dimension] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.839 (P=0.857, R=0.821). P exceeds R by 0.035 — the DDaT element's 23 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DDaT element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Quality assurance of data and analysis involves sorting and cleansing informatio" and "Knowledge of data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timel" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.578 > STS 0.507 (gap +0.071). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, quality] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.5%. Shared tokens: [data, quality]. DDaT-only: [analysis, assurance, based, cleansing, conclusions, confidence]. WIDAI-only: [accuracy, applicable, approaches, completeness, consistency, dimension].

signals.detail: STS 0.507 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
